en: Can't you just make it move faster?
ko: 좀 더 빨리 갈 수 없어?

en: Lovely to be sitting here with you
You're kinda cute but it's raining harder
ko: 넌 좀 귀엽지만 비가 더 세게 내려

en: My shoes are now full of water
Lovely to be rained on with you
It's kinda cute but it's so short

ko: 그리고 넌 나를 집에 데려다 줘

en: And I don't wanna leave but I have to go
You kiss me in your car
And it feels like the start of a movie I've seen
ko: 전에 본 영화의 시작 같은 느낌이야
